title: ATTICUS_MPO baseline state
content: ATTICUS_MPO currently uses release-candidate as the default branch. The work log records baseline v5.0.1 and frames the post-recovery implementation program as the governing plan. The current stored memory cell shape remains thin, and context injection is still shallow and bounded.
context_summary: Durable baseline snapshot for MPO state before the memory-engine context upgrade. Captures branch, baseline, work-log role, and the known weakness in current memory-cell/context behavior.
